user.title: Select OBD Adapter
user.description:
Choose the OBD2 Bluetooth Low Energy adapter to connect to.

If your device doesn't appear: ensure it's powered on and within Bluetooth range. You can also enter the MAC address manually.

For JFIND adapters, you may need to configure the BLE UUIDs after selection.

configure.title: OBD Adapter Settings
configure.description:
Configure the BLE GATT UUIDs for {name}.

Leave at defaults for standard ELM327/LeLink2 adapters.
For JFIND adapters, use:
• Service: 0000fff0-0000-1000-8000-00805f9b34fb
• Read: 0000fff1-0000-1000-8000-00805f9b34fb
• Write: 0000fff1-0000-1000-8000-00805f9b34fb

error.no_unconfigured_devices: No unconfigured OBD adapters found. Ensure the adapter is powered on and within Bluetooth range.

init.title: Configure Generic OBD BLE
init.description: Adjust polling intervals and BLE settings.

data.fast_poll: Fast poll interval (seconds) - when vehicle is on
data.slow_poll: Slow poll interval (seconds) - when vehicle is off but in range
data.xs_poll: Extra-slow poll interval (seconds) - when out of range
